meta.title: Fresnel — Digital Solution Architect
meta.description: Fresnel — providing custom web solutions for entrepreneurs and SMEs. Strategic design and engineering for business growth.

hero.title: I'm Fresnel,
hero.subtitle: I design high-performing web experiences by combining technical rigor, product vision, and the strategic use of artificial intelligence. I work across the entire development cycle to build reliable, scalable, and user-centric solutions.

about.label: About Me
about.title: Design, build,
about.bio1: I'm a software engineer passionate about building products that are useful, performant, and thoughtfully designed. My approach goes beyond writing code — I seek to deeply understand the problem in order to craft solutions that have a real impact.
about.bio2: I work across the entire development cycle, from technical design to production, with a strong focus on code quality, performance, and user experience. I enjoy building clean, scalable, and maintainable architectures.
about.bio3: Through my projects, I've developed expertise in fullstack development and a strong interest in artificial intelligence — particularly around concrete challenges like real-time transcription and natural language processing. I like integrating these technologies pragmatically to build smarter, more useful systems.
about.bio4: Today, I'm constantly looking to grow, take on technical challenges, and build solutions that go beyond just functional.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: High-performance web applications built with React, Next.js, and modern tooling — designed to scale.

items.title: Cross-Platform Development
items.desc: Native-quality mobile experiences for iOS and Android using React Native and Flutter.

items.title: UI / UX Design
items.desc: Human-centered interfaces, design systems, and prototypes that turn complexity into clarity.

projects.label: Recent Work
projects.title: Projects that
projects.subtitle: A curated selection of work spanning SaaS platforms, e-commerce, and immersive brand experiences.

items.title: E-Location
items.desc: A vehicle rental platform with real-time availability, booking management, and an intuitive interface for both users and administrators.

items.title: Gestion Scolaire
items.desc: A complete school management system covering student enrollment, grade tracking, scheduling, and communication between teachers and parents.

items.title: Hotchik
items.desc: A showcase website for a restaurant, featuring the menu, online reservations, and a modern design that reflects the brand identity.

items.title: MP Group
items.desc: A corporate website for a multi-sector company, presenting their services, expertise, and projects with a professional and impactful design.

steps.title: Define & Architect
steps.desc: We align on goals, audience, and technical foundations. Wireframes, system design, and a clear roadmap.

steps.title: Build & Develop
steps.desc: Pixel-perfect interfaces meet robust engineering. Iterative sprints with continuous feedback.

steps.title: Deploy & Support
steps.desc: Launch with confidence. Performance monitoring, refinement, and long-term partnership.

items.name: Sarah Mitchell
items.text: Leo delivered beyond every expectation. The platform he built drove a 40% increase in conversions in the first quarter alone.

items.name: Marcus Reed
items.text: Rare to find someone equally fluent in design and engineering. Leo is that person — and the work shows it.

items.name: Aiko Tanaka
items.text: Working with Leo felt like having a co-founder. Thoughtful, fast, and genuinely invested in the outcome.

items.name: James Whitfield
items.text: Sharp execution, sharper instincts. Our SaaS dashboard has never looked or performed better.

items.name: Elena Castro
items.text: An absolute craftsman. Every interaction, every micro-detail considered. Highly recommend.

items.name: Priya Shah
items.text: Leo took a vague idea and shipped a product that our users genuinely love. That's a rare gift.

items.a: Most projects run 6–12 weeks from kickoff to launch. Smaller engagements can ship in 2–4 weeks; larger platforms may take 3–6 months. I'll give you a precise estimate after our discovery call.

items.q: How does the freelance process work?
items.a: We start with a free 30-minute call to align on goals. I then send a proposal with scope, timeline, and pricing. Once approved, we move into design and development with weekly check-ins.

items.q: Do you collaborate with existing teams?
items.a: Absolutely. I integrate seamlessly with internal product, design, and engineering teams — using your tools, your rituals, and your codebase standards.

items.q: What technologies do you specialize in?
items.a: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, Python, and modern cloud infrastructure (AWS, Vercel, Supabase). For design I work in Figma with full design systems.

items.q: Do you offer ongoing support after launch?
items.a: Yes — I offer monthly retainers covering maintenance, performance monitoring, feature iterations, and strategic advisory.
Project-based for defined scopes, or monthly retainers for ongoing work. Both are transparent and tailored to the engagement size.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's work
contact.subtitle: A project, a question, or just want to connect? I'm available.
contact.infoText: I usually respond within 24 hours. Feel free to reach out through whichever channel works best for you.

cta.title: Your vision, my expertise.
cta.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk about how we can bring it to life.

footer.crafted: Crafted with precision in San Francisco.
